---
title: "Welcome to the wild wild world of Kelse"
---

::: {.hero}
## Your Name or Project

Write a short introduction that tells visitors who you are, what this site is about, or what they can find here.

[Learn more](about.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[View projects](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::

## What I do

I manage the data system that supports the statewide Ryan White program. When I am not at work I am kissing my dogs, thrifting, sewing or adventuring

## Featured work

Use this area to highlight something you want visitors to notice first.

- [Project or resource title](projects.qmd)
- [Another useful link](https://quarto.org/docs/websites/)

## Contact or next steps

Add a preferred way for visitors to contact you, find your work, or learn more. Avoid publishing personal information you do not want to share publicly.
